notes: Baseline: builtins bug present, dispatcher wildcard truncation, sum-pooling retrieval, no whisper
Fixed: builtins whitelist, max-pooling retrieval, whisper transcript, multi-table join. NOT yet: broadened full-pattern-set, retry-on-error
sau khi broaden full-pattern-set (quoted_phrases) + retry LLM 1 lan
Code-first counting cho cau dem anh + bo tin hieu vision nhieu. Q4 sai->dung.
VLM caption cho anh sparse + caption vao prompt vision. Exact_match khong doi (Q5 bien mau, Q6 doc nham). KHONG co Q1/Q11 fix.
Gop tat ca fix: caption-aware index + Q1 headerless sheet + Q11 markdown strip + Q2/Q12 cross-file retrieval. exact_match 4/8->5/8 (Q1=16 dung). Q12 retrieve du 3/3 file.

Code-first scholarship reader: VLM trich bang hoc bong thanh JSON co cau truc (loc bo anh khong phai bang suat that), code chon max off_budget. Q6 dung (SHINNYO). Phat hien + fix them: json.loads strict=False o 5 diem parse JSON tu LLM (reasoner/analyzer/image/table/file_readers) - LLM hay tra ve newline tho trong string 'reasoning', gay loi 'Invalid control character'. Q12 dung tro lai. exact_match 5/8->6/8, khong regression cau nao khac.

3 fix: (1) Q2 - shortlist sheet lien quan (columns-only ToC + sample rows cho sheet nho nhu README) truoc khi build schema day du cho compute_table_answer, giai quyet schema 170k ky tu vuot truncate 16000 lam mat sheet can thiet; phat sinh regression Q1 (shortlist lam lo sheet nham lan truoc do bi truncate che di) -> them rule 'khong tu bia them nguong loc' vao codegen prompt, fix xong Q1 (16). (2) Q5 - mo rong _STRUCTURED_VISION_PROMPT: digit dang icon/badge (so trang trong khung tron dac mau) tinh mau icon la mau so, kem 1 vi du cu the (rule chung chung truoc do khong du manh, phu thuoc cau chu 'contain' vs 'show'). (3) Q8 - them compute_roster_answer: LLM trich JSON roster tung project (is_core, members), code tinh current_count=len(members) (loai SV moi), chon max trong is_core=True. Xac nhan voi user: dap an dung la SO LUONG THANH VIEN (7), khong phai so thu tu project. exact_match 6/8 -> 8/8 (100%). Q2 (llm_judge) tu 'Not enough data' -> chua dung ten gene CDK12/SMARCA4 nhung dinh dang con dai dong (liet ke tung site thay vi ten gene gon) - can polish them.

Them rule .str.strip() cho filter string trong _CODEGEN_PROMPT (phat hien qua bo cau hoi moi generated_sample_data: census.csv co gia tri ' >50K' co khoang trang dau, filter '==' khong strip ra 0 thay vi 7841). Bo cau cu khong regression (8/8 exact_match, 13/15 tong the, giong het truoc).

Bo cau hoi moi (generated_sample_data.xlsx, 15 cau, tai su dung Data-Lake + index cu). exact_match 12/13->13/13 sau fix strip whitespace o Q14 (census.csv income column co leading space). Overall (exact+llm_judge) = 15/15 (100%).

5 bug tim thay qua bo cau hoi generated_hard_questions, fix xong deu ap dung chung cho toan bo pipeline: (1) header Excel lech dong (mmc/scientific xlsx), (2) modality_hint chan vision sai cho anh chart, (3) context budget khong cong bang cho cau needs_multiple_sources, (4) roster compute bia du an gia + chi ho tro most khong ho tro fewest, (5) rule uu tien multiple-choice truoc digit-form (tranh regression Q13). exact_match 8/8, overall 14/15 (93.3%, tang tu 13/15) - Q1,Q2,Q13 deu dung tro lai, chi con Q3 (xem known_issues).

Chay lai sau cac fix header/vision-gate/context-budget/roster-direction/multiple-choice de xac nhan khong regression. exact_match 13/13 giu nguyen. llm_judge Q3 lech nhe (thieu nhan manh yeu to con nguoi trong groundtruth) - bien thien chu quan cua cau tong hop, khong phai bug.
